home.hero_desc: The first Arabic screen recording tool with smart transcription that supports all dialects. Save hours of report writing.
home.hero_footer: ✓ No credit card · ✓ 25 free recordings · ✓ No installation
home.stats_subtitle: Everything you need in one place
home.stats_desc: One product solving a real problem for millions of Arabs every day
home.compare_subtitle: What Loom fails at, we succeed
home.pricing_subtitle: Pay with Visa or crypto — features delivered instantly
home.cta_desc: Join now and record your first clip for free. No credit card, no complications.
home.feature_recording_desc: One click to start recording your screen and audio together — no software installation needed
home.feature_transcription_desc: Whisper trained on all Arabic dialects, transcribing every word with incredible accuracy
home.feature_search_desc: Search any word across all your recordings — finds the exact moment by second
home.feature_ai_desc: One button for Claude to translate text to English or summarize into key points
home.feature_export_desc: Download text as Word, SRT for videos, or JSON for developers
home.feature_privacy_desc: Your files on your server or the cloud — no one sees your data

recorder.title_placeholder: e.g. Project walkthrough for the team

recorder.error_drive_download: Failed to download file from Google Drive
